race.comment: The well-related SHE'S SPEEDY (9) (half to G3 winner Rich Fortune) loves this sprint journey with two wins and two seconds from four attempts and is much better than the recent effort suggests. Is one from one over this track and trip and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. EXTRA FREE (11) got a well-deserved victory over this course and distance last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that win. Suitably placed here so anticipating another strong performance. DRAGON TALES (5) goes well for hoop Holt who has two wins and three placings from nine steers and will be at peak fitness for this. In the mix. NORTHERNONTAP (2) is a four-time winner at this circuit who shouldn't be discounted lightly. THE KAMIKAZE (1) next best despite the awkward draw.
